escalation.rationale: Iran shoots down multiple US fighter jets including F-35s while projectile hits near Bushehr nuclear facility, marking significant escalation in 34-day war.

ticker_items: Iran shoots down US F-35 fighter jet, bounty placed on pilots
Projectile strikes near Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one
Israeli strikes damage Lebanese hospital in Tyre ground invasion
Russia launches 400-drone assault marking spring offensive against Ukraine
UK hosts 40-nation summit on reopening blocked Strait of Hormuz

new_entrant.text: Yemen's Houthis formally announce 'Holy Jihad Battle' operation joining Iran-Hezbollah alliance against Israel.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian forces struck five strategic plants and ten oil refining facilities across Russia in March.
Russian forces kill at least 4 people in aerial attacks as spring offensive continues.

middle_east.description: Iranian cluster missile attack hit nine impact sites in central Israel residential areas.
Yemeni Armed Forces conducted joint ballistic missile strike on Israeli positions.
IRGC Operation True Promise 4 Wave 90 targeted US steel and aluminum facilities in UAE and Bahrain.
Iran shoots down US F-35 fighter jet with search underway for crew.
Projectile hits near Bushehr nuclear facility killing one person, fourth such attack.
Israeli strikes damage Lebanese Italian Hospital injuring 11 people during ground invasion.

today.incident: Iranian cluster missile attack on Israel

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 Iranian dead, 24 Israeli dead, 13 US soldiers dead

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: We all need stability, calm, a return to peace - this isn't a show!
middle_east.speaker: Emmanuel Macron
middle_east.title: French President

middle_east.text: The United States and the Israeli regime do not know anything about the Islamic Republic's vast and strategic capabilities despite their claims.
middle_east.speaker: Iranian military spokesperson
middle_east.title: IRGC Representative

middle_east.text: Our military hasn't even started to destroy what is left of Iran
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Macron sharply criticized US attitude as eroding NATO's substance while exploring cooperation with South Korea on Strait of Hormuz stability. France positioned as alternative leadership voice within fractured alliance.
Easter peace marches planned amid anxiety over Middle East war and reintroduction of conscription. German peace movement mobilizing against escalating conflicts.
Britain convened virtual summit with 40 countries exploring ways to reopen Strait of Hormuz as global oil prices surge. UK taking diplomatic leadership role in crisis resolution.

financial.notes: Global oil prices climbing as UK hosts 40-nation talks on reopening Iran-blocked Strait of Hormuz chokepoint.

update_log.text: Iran shoots down second US F-35 fighter jet over central parts of country according to Tehran claims
Israeli strikes damage Lebanese Italian Hospital in Tyre injuring 11 as ground invasion advances
Projectile hits near Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant killing one person in fourth such attack
Yemen's Houthis announce Holy Jihad Battle operation joining Iran-Hezbollah alliance against Israel
Iranian missile attack hits residential areas across central Israel with nine impact sites reported.
US fighter jet confirmed shot down over Iran with search underway for missing crewmember.
Trump threatens NATO withdrawal over European refusal to help reopen Strait of Hormuz.
IRGC launches 90th wave of Operation True Promise 4 targeting US facilities in Gulf states.
